hero.headline: AI systems, premium websites, and digital infrastructure for ambitious brands.
hero.subtitle: Chiti designs and builds intelligent digital systems across commerce, SaaS, automation, and modern web experiences.

services.title: What we build
services.subtitle: Digital systems for commerce, SaaS, AI, and brand-led experiences.
services.card02Desc: Custom AI systems that reduce manual work.
services.card03Desc: Product storytelling, checkout flows, WhatsApp inquiry, CRM-ready commerce.
services.card04Desc: Dense, scalable interfaces for data-heavy products.
services.card05Desc: WhatsApp, CRM, forms, lead capture, follow-ups, internal workflows.
services.card06Desc: Reusable brand/UI systems for faster future launches.

process.title: How we build
process.quote: We don't start with screens. We first understand the business, then design the system that should exist behind the interface.
process.step01Desc: Understand your goals, audit existing systems, and define measurable KPIs before writing a single line of code.
process.step02Desc: Design the system blueprint — data models, tech stack, integrations, and infrastructure that scales with your business.
process.step03Desc: Build the user-facing layer. UI design, interaction patterns, brand implementation, and front-end engineering.
process.step04Desc: Connect workflows, CRM pipelines, AI agents, and third-party tools into a unified operational system.
process.step05Desc: Deploy, monitor performance, run growth experiments, and iterate based on real usage data.

work.title: Selected Work
work.subtitle: Design, engineering, and business thinking working together.
work.wipBanner: This project is in active development. Screens and flows shown reflect the current iteration.

about.title: About Chiti
about.subtitle: A Sanskrit-rooted word associated with intelligence, awareness, and formation. For us, it represents thoughtful creation — systems designed with clarity, purpose, and responsibility.
about.philosophyBody: Chiti Technologies builds websites, AI workflows, and digital systems for modern brands and products. We approach digital products as systems — not isolated pages. Design, automation, and business logic are considered together from the start.
about.collectiveBody: Small team. Focused work. We partner with brands that need more than templates — they need systems that operate, sell, and scale.
about.pillar01Desc: Every line of code, model, and pipeline is built with intent — solving today's problems while leaving room for tomorrow's growth.
about.pillar02Desc: Sub-second latency, strong security, and reliable uptime are our baseline — not afterthoughts.
about.pillar03Desc: The highest form of sophistication is simplicity. We take complex mechanics and make them feel effortless.
about.blueprintBody: Custom automated workflows, design systems, and digital products that let your business evolve without rebuilding from scratch.
about.blueprintTagline: Strong systems. Sharp interfaces. Uncompromising results.

contact.heroTitle: Tell us about the work that matters to you.
contact.heroSubtitle: We build digital systems for founders and brands who care about craft, performance, and long-term thinking.
contact.phil01Desc: We don't separate design from development. Every system we build is considered as a whole — how it looks, how it works, and how it behaves under real-world conditions.
contact.phil02Desc: We stay for the iteration cycle, the next version, the scale. A launch is a milestone, not an endpoint. We're invested in what happens after.
contact.phil03Desc: Beauty without function is decoration. We build digital products that drive revenue — through smarter workflows, sharper conversions, and infrastructure that delivers measurable results.
contact.callDesc: Book a free discovery call. We'll discuss your project, answer your questions, and see if we're the right fit.
contact.formSuccess: Thank you. We'll review your message and get back to you within 24-48 hours.
contact.formPlaceholderMessage: Briefly describe your goals, timeline, and any existing brand assets...
contact.responseDesc: Typically within 24-48 hours. We value deep work and intentional responses over speed.

cta.headline: Tell us what you want to build.
cta.subtitle: Whether you need a premium website, AI workflow, or a complete digital system, Chiti can help turn your idea into infrastructure that works.

founder.name: Prabhakar Kumar
founder.title: Founder & System Architect — Chiti Technologies
founder.copy: Chiti Technologies was built on a conviction: digital products should be beautiful, intelligent, ethical, and commercially useful. We don't build template websites. We build systems that help brands operate, sell, and scale.

ladder.title: Engagement Models
ladder.subtitle: Every project is custom. These tiers describe scope, not packages.
ladder.tier01Desc: Websites, landing pages, brand direction, launch-ready digital presence.
ladder.tier02Desc: Ecommerce, SaaS dashboards, AI agents, workflow automation, internal tools.
ladder.tier03Desc: Funnels, CRM, WhatsApp automation, retargeting, analytics, conversion systems.
ladder.cta: Discuss the right system for your brand

footer.description: Chiti Technologies builds AI systems, websites, commerce infrastructure, automation workflows, and scalable product interfaces for ambitious brands.
